name: Reusable-Agents Competitor Research
description: Self-improvement: scans this framework's own codebase + compares against competitor agent platforms (n8n, Temporal, Airflow, Prefect, Inngest, etc.). Recommends parity-gap features and competitive-advantage ideas to keep reusable-agents on its toes. Codebase-mode (no public website yet).

confirmation_flow.description: Weekly self-improvement report — scans the reusable-agents framework's own codebase + features, compares against competitor agent platforms, emails ranked recommendations. User replies to mark which to ship.
